productDisplayName: Mother Earth Women Checks Red Shirts
description: CompositionRed and yellow check top with blue accents, made of 100% woven cotton, has three-quarter sleeves with buttoned cuffs, Mandarin collar with a buttoned chest placket, pleat on the right end of the placket, thread detailing as a bib, slit pockets with buttoned loops on the waist and a curved hemFittingRegularWash careHand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleedFlat dry inside out in shadeWarm ironPerfect for the pretty you, this cotton tunic top from mother earth is a great addition to your wardrobe. The embroidered bib lining and stylish slit pockets on the waist oozes feminine vibe, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day.
